case_title: BENEMANN TRANSLATION CENTER VS SANDOVAL, EDUARDO ESQ.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $468.70 FILED BY BENEMANN TRANSLATION CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, EDUARDO  ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
